title: Stocks to buy under  ₹200: Mehul Kothari of Anand Rathi recommends three shares to buy or sell
summary: Kothari recommends Yes Bank, Punjab National Bank, and Bandhan Bank for short-term investments under  ₹200. The market remains cautious amid global uncertainties and rising crude oil prices.

title: Buy or sell: Sumeet Bagadia recommends three stocks to buy on Monday - 25 May 2026
summary: Sumeet Bagadia suggests buying Wipro and Eicher Motors due to bullish signals and recovery from declines. Wipro is recommended at  ₹200-203 with a target of  ₹213, while Eicher Motors is advised at  ₹6,980 targeting  ₹7,200-7,300.

title: I asked ChatGPT which SIP date gives best returns? Here's what AI said based on historical data
summary: There is no single best SIP date for maximizing long-term returns; historical trends show negligible differences between dates. Staggered SIPs on the 1st, 15th, and 25th offer a balanced approach. Factors like increasing SIPs and maintaining asset allocation are more important for wealth creation.

title: Paytm Pocket Money to FamApp: 8 apps helping teenagers make digital payments without bank accounts
summary: Teen-focused fintech apps like Paytm Pocket Money and FamApp are helping young Indians make digital payments without bank accounts through prepaid cards, UPI access, parental controls and budgeting tools.

title: Gold, silver prices today: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver on 23 May in Delhi, Mumbai and Kolkata
summary: On 23 May, gold prices in India remained stable, with 24-karat gold priced at  ₹159,320 per 10 grams. Silver prices also showed limited movement, with 999 Fine silver at  ₹272,250 per kg. MCX trading is closed on weekends, limiting live updates.

title: Delhi’s new ration card rules changed: Fresh issuance begins after 13 years – Check new income limit, how to apply
summary: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta announced the resumption of issuing new ration cards from May 15 after 13 years. The government has cancelled 7.72 lakh invalid cards and is inviting fresh online applications, with eligibility limits for annual family income raised from  ₹1 lakh to  ₹1.20 lakh.

title: National Pension System: PFRDA clarifies NPS charge structure — what you need to know
summary: The PFRDA has clarified that NPS Tier-II accounts will incur annual maintenance charges (AMCs) similar to Tier-I accounts. The AMC for dormant accounts will be 10% and PRAN opening charge shall apply only at the time of initial PRAN generation.&nbsp;

title: Petrol, diesel price hiked third time in 10 days: Analysts warn of more hikes ahead— how high can rates go?
summary: Petrol and diesel prices rose by up to 91 paise per litre, marking the third increase in less than 10 days. Analysts predict further hikes may be necessary as oil companies face significant losses due to elevated crude prices stemming from the West Asia conflict.

title: Bank holiday today: Are SBI, HDFC Bank, and other banks closed on Saturday, May 23?
summary: All banks in India are closed on May 23, 2026, due to the scheduled bank holiday on the fourth Saturday. This closure is part of the RBI's holiday schedule, with banks also closed on specific Sundays and local holidays varying by state.

title: Concurrent Losers: 13 stocks decline for 5 consecutive sessions
summary: Even as the Sensex posted modest gains during the week ending May 22, 13 BSE 500 stocks declined in every trading session. Afcons Infrastructure and Alok Industries led the losses with 11% declines, while several consumer, metal and industrial stocks also ended lower.

title: Nomura picks 6 stocks with up to 49% upside potential that can benefit from India’s EV push
summary: Nomura said India’s EV adoption is nearing an inflection point amid rising fuel prices and supportive policies. The brokerage identified six stocks, including M&M, TVS Motor and UNO Minda, as key beneficiaries of accelerating electric vehicle demand across passenger and two-wheeler segments.

title: Why organized players like Titan Company could emerge bigger winners in India’s evolving gold market
summary: India's gold market is rapidly formalizing despite high prices and tax hikes. Resilient consumer demand, especially for investment, favors organized players like Titan. Titan, leveraging Tanishq's brand strength, is projected for significant growth, modeling a sales/EBITDA/PAT CAGR of ~15%/20%/24% over FY26–28.

title: Paytm block deal: SocGen, Ghisallo, Viridian among biggest buyers in Rs 964 crore stake sale
summary: Paytm's parent company, One 97 Communications, saw Rs 964 crore in block deals on Friday. Major institutional investors like Societe Generale and Nippon India Mutual Fund bought shares. Existing shareholders such as SAIF Partners reduced their holdings. This activity occurred as Paytm shares experienced a decline. The stock has shown a recovery over the past year.

title: Reliance Industries, TCS, among 10 stocks with sharpest decrease in retail shareholding in Q4
summary: Ten major stocks, including HDFC Bank, Reliance Industries, and ITC, experienced the sharpest decrease in retail shareholding value, corresponding with significant stock price declines during the quarter.

title: Patient capital trusts India as hot money exits; FDI inflow rises 17% YoY
summary: In the fiscal year 2025-26, India witnessed a remarkable surge in foreign direct investment, soaring to $94.5 billion. This uptick is particularly notable given the backdrop of global economic turbulence. Investors from abroad demonstrated a keen interest, predominantly in the finance and technology arenas. Additionally, net FDI inflows experienced a noteworthy rise, underscoring India’s growing attractiveness to international financiers.

title: D-Street ends week in the green with war and peace on its mind
summary: Friday brought a wave of optimism to Indian stock markets, with notable weekly advancements. Nonetheless, investors remained watchful as talks between the US and Iran unfolded. The Nifty 50 and BSE Sensex ended the day higher, driven largely by gains in the banking and financial sectors.

title: Retail players can skip Central Bank of India OFS, say analysts, cite margin and earnings concerns
summary: Retail investors are being urged by market analysts to steer clear of the government's shares sale in Central Bank of India. The bank's current margin issues and uncertain future profitability raise red flags. Despite the attractive discount on the offer price, experts forecast further share sales needed for compliance, leading to persistent sales pressure on the stock.

title: 3M India announces special dividend of  ₹506/share; posts blockbuster Q4 results 2026 - Check details
summary: 3M India announced a total dividend of  ₹506 per share, including a special dividend of  ₹346. The record date is set for July 17, 2026, pending shareholder approval at the AGM in August. The company reported a 202% YoY profit increase for Q4 FY26.

title: Expert view: Peak macro concerns behind; time for staggered accumulation, says Waterfield Advisors' head of equities
summary: Expert view: Waterfield Advisors' head of equities, Vipul Bhowar, emphasises a staggered investment strategy. The resolution of geopolitical tensions could catalyse sectoral growth, but inflation and consumer spending remain critical challenges for investors to consider.

title: How intelligent NBFCs are fuelling India’s next credit cycle
summary: India's NBFC sector is undergoing a transformative shift from shadow banking to intelligent lending, driven by AI and data-led decision-making. This evolution is expanding credit access and enhancing customer experience.

title: US stock markets this week: S&P 500 posts longest winning streak since 2023; Dow jumps over 2% for the week
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose more than 2% during the week, while the S&amp;P 500 gained over 1%. The tech-heavy NASDAQ Composite advanced 0.5% during the period.

title: Can Nifty 50 hit 30,000 by FY27-end? Smallcase managers remain bullish despite 9% decline YTD
summary: Despite a 9% decline in Nifty this year, smallcase managers are optimistic about FY27, predicting the index will reach 28,000–30,000. They emphasize earnings growth over valuation expansion, highlighting sectors like Banking and Capital Goods for future gains.

title: Seven ways AI is making 2025 tech layoffs different from Silicon Valley’s earlier job cuts
summary: Tech layoffs in 2025 are increasingly targeting middle management and coordination-heavy roles as companies restructure around AI. Firms like Amazon, Meta and Shopify are pushing flatter hierarchies, AI-first hiring and smaller teams instead of broad pandemic-style cuts.

title: Does debit card EMI affect your credit score? Everything you need to know
summary: Debit card EMI influences credit score based on repayment behaviour, with timely payments improving credit profile while defaults or multiple loans may negatively affect borrowing capacity across financial institutions.

title: IDFC FIRST Bank launches FD-backed Business Multiplier Metal Credit Card for entrepreneurs, Check details
summary: With a dedicated credit limit for business expenses, the card can be used across a wide range of expenses including office supplies, digital marketing spends, SaaS subscriptions, and business travel.

title: I asked ChatGPT which international trip is best under  ₹50,000 — Thailand, Vietnam or Sri Lanka? The winner surprised me
summary: Thailand is ideal for nightlife and shopping, while Vietnam excels in affordability and culture, making it the best value. Sri Lanka offers a peaceful holiday. For  ₹50,000, Vietnam provides a premium experience with quality accommodation and food.

title: Why the first crore feels slow, but the next comes faster – ‘8-4-3 rule’ of compounding explained
summary: Investing benefits from compounding over time, highlighted by the '8-4-3 rule' which shows how wealth accelerates. FundsIndia's report emphasizes patience, revealing that equities show true potential after seven years, with returns significantly outweighing contributions in the long run.

title: Missed a home loan EMI? Here are smart steps to avoid credit damage and manage loan repayment stress
summary: Missing a home loan EMI can hurt your credit score and weaken your financial stability. Timely communication with your lender, smart repayment planning and expert financial advice can help you manage the situation effectively.

title: I asked ChatGPT how to make my child a crorepati by age 18? AI suggests this investments roadmap and math behind it
summary: Parents can build a  ₹1 crore corpus for their child by age 18 through early investments, averaging  ₹8,000– ₹10,000 monthly via SIPs. Compounding plays a key role, and delaying investment increases monthly contributions significantly.

title: Nifty stays range-bound as resistance near 23,800 caps upside move
summary: Indian markets ended the week with modest gains as Nifty remained range-bound, testing key resistance near 23,800 while volatility eased. Technical indicators show neutral-to-cautious sentiment, with consolidation expected to continue until a decisive breakout above resistance confirms a stronger trend.

title: Vedanta, MCX, among 10 stocks that saw highest increase in retail shareholding in Q4. Do you own any?
Explained! Modus operandi and how Sebi cracked whip in alleged pump-and-dump scheme involving 82 stocks
summary: Sebi has exposed a stock manipulation network that used social media platforms like Telegram, WhatsApp, and X to artificially inflate SME stock prices. The accused allegedly employed a pump-and-dump strategy, accumulating shares before circulating bullish messages and then selling at elevated levels to retail investors. The regulator has barred seven individuals and impounded Rs 20.25 crore in unlawful gains.

title: Gold at $10,000, Silver at $200? Rich Dad Poor Dad author Robert Kiyosaki says stock market crash is imminent
summary: Kiyosaki, referencing Jim Rickards, predicts significant price increases for gold and silver amid concerns over global debt and inflation. His comments highlight a growing belief among investors that traditional currencies may face challenges, prompting a shift towards hard assets.

title: Why bond yields matter more than most investors realise
summary: The US 10-year bond yield shapes borrowing costs, stock valuations, currency movements and global capital flows—making it one of the most closely watched indicators in finance.

title: Planning for retirement as a freelancer? We ask experts how much corpus you need, and key considerations
summary: Retirement planning: We asked experts how much corpus a 27-year-old freelancer, living in Chennai and planning to retire to Munnar, will require to support parents and slow work by 55 years of age. Here's what they said…
